message:
feat(widgets): input Ctrl+W, toast/progress display-width, cursor fixes

TextInput (input.rs):
- Add Ctrl+W binding for delete-word-back (standard Unix terminal binding)
- Fix cursor positioning when combining characters merge with adjacent
  graphemes during paste operations. Previous logic incorrectly assumed
  insert_count matched grapheme delta, but combining marks can merge
  without increasing total count.
- New cursor calculation: track old_cursor, compute actual grapheme delta
  after insertion, position cursor at old_cursor + delta (clamped to total)
- Added test helper cell_at() for cleaner frame buffer assertions

Toast (toast.rs):
- Display-width aware rendering for proper Unicode alignment
- Improved layout calculations for wide characters

Progress (progress.rs):
- Display-width correctness for progress labels containing Unicode
- Better handling of multi-width characters in progress bars

Block (block.rs):
- Minor type safety improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
